name: Standard Crit
description: The reliable carry path. Essence Reaver and Navori keep Q on a near-permanent cooldown while Infinity Edge turns every auto and Q into a crit. Galeforce — now a standalone item since patch 7.2 folded boot enchants into the regular item pool — adds a crit-fueled dash and execute.

name: On-Hit
description: Trinity proc plus stacked on-hit effects. Blade, Kraken and Wit's End make every basic bite, with Rageblade amplifying the whole package and Stridebreaker — a standalone item since patch 7.2 — adding more attack speed to feed procs.

name: Permafrost
description: The ultimate slow build. Rylai's, Iceborn, Frozen Heart, Dead Man's and Randuin's mean nothing within range ever moves at full speed again — and Stridebreaker, now a standalone item since patch 7.2, brings one more slow on its dash. Pure menace, zero meta.
